name: mistralrs-config-wizard
description: Configuration assistant for mistral.rs — generates config.toml, .env, quickstart.sh, and Kubernetes manifests with hardware-matched TurboQuant KV-cache compression recommendations.

slash_commands.name: mistralrs-config
slash_commands.description: Auto-detect intent and route to the right configuration mode

slash_commands.name: mistralrs-wizard
slash_commands.description: Guided first-time setup: hardware → model → compression → generate config.toml + .env + quickstart.sh

slash_commands.name: mistralrs-advise
slash_commands.description: Explain any mistral.rs configuration option, CLI flag, or environment variable

slash_commands.name: mistralrs-validate
slash_commands.description: Check an existing config.toml and/or .env for errors and conflicts

slash_commands.name: mistralrs-model-select
slash_commands.description: Hardware profile → model recommendation → TurboQuant KV-cache compression sizing

slash_commands.name: mistralrs-stack
slash_commands.description: Full bundle generator: config.toml + .env + quickstart.sh (+ optional k8s manifests)

slash_commands.name: mistralrs-k8s
slash_commands.description: Generate Kubernetes Secret + ConfigMap + Deployment YAML or docker-compose.yml

slash_commands.name: mistralrs-migrate
slash_commands.description: Convert existing mistralrs CLI shell scripts to structured config.toml + .env

resources.description: All CLI flags with TOML and env var equivalents
Supported model architectures with hardware fit guidance
